title: Disable Notion Integration Icon in Production
description: Hide the Notion integration icon in the production environment. The Notion integration feature is not yet ready for general availability and should remain visible only in staging/development environments until further validation is complete.
acceptance_criteria: Notion integration icon is not visible in the production environment
Notion integration icon remains visible in staging/development environments
No other integration icons are affected
ux_changes: Notion integration icon is hidden in production via environment-based conditional rendering.
implementation_notes: Icon disabled on the main branch and tested.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed the Notion icon was disabled and tested on main.
